utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding items. Each appears to have the required details: each of the first four includes coverage type and a cost; total_budget includes monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are present and specified with costs as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific plans: EliteCare Premium Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). I matched each plan name exactly to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage.physical_health (and mental_health shares the same plan name but the health plan here is a combined description; the plan name matches the physical/mental EliteCare Premium Plan, which in both categories has rating 10), property_protection.home_content, and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. Each of these items has a rating of 10 in the ground-truth data.
